title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
summary_full: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.
summary_public: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia
